creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Sun, Dec 31, 2000 at 04:25:51PM +0100, Anton Berezin wrote:
> I've just put a new shar here.
[..]

Excellent.  We'll probably see an influx of Perl 5.6.0-only modules in
the near future.

It's a shame perl module makers want to limit their audience to people
strictly working on 5.6.0 since this version hasn't even been out more
than a few months... guess they couldn't wait for a larger number of
actual users to have perl in their standard userland.  :-(

-- 
wca
